description: A hydrologist needs to map snow cover to estimate spring meltwater runoff. Process the Landsat multispectral image at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (band_1: SWIR1, band_2: NIR, band_3: Red, band_4: Green) to include a new 'NDSI' band calculated as (band_4 - band_1) / (band_4 + band_1) and a 'Snow_Mask' band where pixels are 1 if NDSI > 0.4 and 0 otherwise. Save the final product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_projects/snow_mapping.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/snow_mapping.tif.
